title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class AI model with strong capabilities in software engineering, vision, analytics, and scientific research. The model includes built-in safety systems that restrict its capabilities in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class AI model with capabilities spanning software engineering, vision, analytics, and scientific research. It details the model's built-in safety systems, which restrict capabilities in high-risk areas including cybersecurity and chemistry. The key takeaway is the pairing of broad technical capability with deliberate capability restriction in sensitive domains.
